Welcome

What We Do

Our Services

Professional grooming tailored to every breed, every size, every personality.

Full Grooming

Complete bath, haircut, nail trim, ear cleaning, and finishing touches for a head-to-tail transformation.

Bath & Brush

Refreshing bath with premium shampoo, thorough brushing, and blow-dry to keep your pup clean and fluffy.

Nail Trimming

Quick and gentle nail trimming to keep paws healthy and prevent discomfort from overgrown nails.

Ear Cleaning

Gentle ear cleaning to remove buildup and help prevent infections, keeping your dog comfortable.

De-Shedding Treatment

Specialized treatment to reduce loose fur and undercoat, keeping your home cleaner and coat healthier.

Puppy's First Groom

A gentle, patient introduction to grooming for puppies. We make their first experience positive and stress-free.

Our Story

Meet the Owner

Jacqueline Oltman has been grooming dogs in Columbus since 2006. What started as a passion for animals became Tailwagger's Grooming Salon, a place where every pup is treated like family.

With hundreds of happy clients and 5-star reviews, Jacqueline and her team provide gentle, professional grooming that keeps your furry friend looking and feeling their best.
